global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute travel savings with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Last-minute savings
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Last-minute savings' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying urgency.

elements.label: Special fares today
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Special fares today', adding context to the main message.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square and a circle in lighter shades of purple are positioned in the center, creating a modern design element.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle in a lighter shade of purple is placed near the bottom center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Install now
elements.description: A white button with the text 'Install now' is located at the bottom center, inviting user action.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' appears in the top left corner in white, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: UGC tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' is positioned in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A decorative element that adds to the overall design without a specific function.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and vibrant, last-minute savings, install now
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the body text is below it, the logo is in the top left, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Last-minute savings, Special fares today, CloudRoute, Install now, UGC
